.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.net.*; below import java.io.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant definitions for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in string constant assignments.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard code style.
Added spaces after 'if' keywords in nested conditions.
Added spaces after 'if' keywords in null checks.
Reformatted System.out.println error message to a single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line System.out.println call into one line.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks for new Authenticator() block.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter.CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to log statement to ensure log lines are not split by logback converters.
Modify active profiles logging to show default profiles if no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace backslash-escaped single quotes with standard single quotes in a log message string literal.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "Exception in {}() with cause = \'{}\' and exception = \'{}\'" to "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to exclude specific test profiles to prevent conflicts during testing.
Wrap single string argument in array braces to comply with stricter annotation value syntax rules.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ compatibility.
Remove explicit registration of Zalando Problem modules, likely because they are now auto-configured or no longer needed in the updated framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reorder constructor parameters to align with Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE conventions or internal refactoring.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved @LiquibaseDataSource ObjectProvider<DataSource> liquibaseDataSource after LiquibaseProperties liquibaseProperties

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Liquibase API method setLabels with setLabelFilter to maintain compatibility with newer Liquibase versions.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone @Configuration class returning a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.0+ method security.
Replace deprecated authorizeRequests().antMatchers() with authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() for lambda-based configuration.
Replace deprecated headers() DSL with lambda-based headers() configuration for CSP, frame options, and referrer policy.
Replace deprecated featurePolicy() with permissionsPolicy() as the former is removed in newer Spring Security versions.
Replace deprecated exceptionHandling() DSL with lambda-based exceptionHandling() configuration.
Replace deprecated sessionManagement() DSL with lambda-based sessionManagement() configuration.
Replace deprecated csrf() DSL with lambda-based csrf() configuration.
Add oauth2ResourceServer configuration to handle JWT authentication, replacing custom JWTConfigurer.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handlers with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Replace manual CorsFilter injection with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
Remove configure(WebSecurity web) method as static resources are now handled via permitAll in SecurityFilterChain.
Move Content Security Policy configuration from hardcoded string to JHipsterProperties.
Change frame options from deny to sameOrigin to support modern SPA requirements.
Add security rule for /v3/api-docs/** endpoints requiring ADMIN authority.
Refine public endpoint matching to explicitly allow static assets and specific API endpoints.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the redundant 'app' subdirectory path.
Update resource path patterns to use file extensions and broader matching instead of directory-based paths.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced "/app/*", "/content/*", "/i18n/*" with specific extensions like "/*.js", "/*.css" and "/content/**".

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always available in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 endpoints instead of Swagger 2.
Clean up imports that are no longer used after the code changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException; import java.util.*; import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
